name: Chicken En Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into pieces.
2. Dredge each piece in flour.
3. Brown the chicken in hot cooking fat.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Place the chicken in a casserole dish.
6. Add water to cover the chicken.
7. Cover and cook slowly until the chicken is tender.
8. Add the vegetables that have been browned in the cooking fat.
9. Cover and cook slowly until the vegetables are tender.
10. If necessary, add more water.
11. Remove the chicken from the casserole.
12. Combine milk with 2 tablespoons of flour to form a smooth mixture.
13. Mix the sauce with the vegetables and chicken broth.
14. Cook slowly, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth.
15. Serve the casserole with chicken.
16. Optionally, add 1/4 teaspoon of curry powder for flavor variety.
8 servings.
